instructions: Turn the two valves by rotating them counterclockwise.
Grip each valve and twist it counterclockwise.
Use your hands to turn both valves in the counterclockwise direction.
Rotate the pair of valves counterclockwise to the target position.
Grasp and twist each valve counterclockwise.
Turn both valves to the left until they reach the target angle.
Rotate each of the two valves counterclockwise on the table.
Grab the valves one at a time and rotate them counterclockwise.
Twist both valves counterclockwise to complete the task.
